title: senecio × kewensis
intro: Senecio × kewensis, also known as the Kew hybrid or Jacob's Ladder, is a rare and hybrid plant species that belongs to the Senecio genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, as it contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids that have been shown to have expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio × kewensis include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms associated with bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote respiratory health.
